name: Tri Wealth Bracelet
details:
Product Description

Bring together prosperity, protection and grounded confidence with the Tri Wealth Bracelet Set. This coordinated set includes three individually designed crystal bracelets featuring Pyrite, Black Obsidian, Lava Stone and a symbolic Hamsa Hand charm.

Each bracelet offers a different look while staying connected through a rich black and metallic colour palette. Wear one bracelet for a clean everyday statement or stack all three together for a bold, power-inspired wrist look.

The set is designed for people who want to move towards growth and success while staying protected, focused and emotionally grounded.

The Set Includes
1. Richie Rich Dual Bead Bracelet

A minimal bracelet featuring alternating Pyrite and glossy Black Obsidian beads. The balanced design represents moving towards prosperity while remaining grounded and protected.

2. Wealth Protection Lava Bracelet

A statement bracelet combining Pyrite, Black Obsidian and textured Lava Stone beads. Metallic spacer accents add contrast and give it a premium layered appearance.

3. Hamsa Wealth Shield Bracelet

A symbolic bracelet featuring Pyrite, Lava Stone and an antique-finished Hamsa Hand charm. The design brings together abundance-inspired crystal energy and traditional protection symbolism.

Why Choose It?

Three Coordinated Designs:
Includes three different bracelets that can be worn separately, paired together or styled as a complete stack.

Prosperity and Protection Combination:
Pyrite is traditionally linked with abundance and confidence, while Black Obsidian is associated with grounding and protection.

Textured Lava Stone Detailing:
Porous Lava Stone beads add depth, character and a naturally bold appearance.

Symbolic Hamsa Charm:
The Hamsa Hand is traditionally worn as a symbol of protection against nazar and unwanted energy.

Versatile Black and Metallic Finish:
The neutral colour combination complements casual, office, festive and evening outfits.

Flexible Slip-On Construction:
The stretch design allows the bracelets to be worn without a complicated clasp.

Crafted With
Pyrite — The Wealth Crystal

Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, ambition, confidence and a growth-focused mindset. Its metallic appearance adds a rich finish to each bracelet.

Black Obsidian — The Protection Crystal

Black Obsidian is commonly associated with grounding and protection from negativity, envy and emotional distractions. Studd Muffyn’s Richie Rich range similarly combines Pyrite for prosperity with Black Obsidian for protection and balance.

Lava Stone — The Grounding Element

Lava Stone is traditionally connected with strength, stability and emotional grounding. Its porous surface provides a raw texture that contrasts beautifully with the polished beads.

Hamsa Hand Charm

The antique-finished Hamsa charm adds a meaningful protective symbol and creates a distinctive statement within the set.

Metallic Spacer Accents

Silver-toned spacer elements create separation between the darker beads and give the bracelets a polished, premium finish.

Flexible Stretch Cord

Keeps the beads securely arranged while supporting easy slip-on wear.

Crystal Significance
Prosperity

Pyrite is often called a wealth-inspired crystal because it is traditionally associated with abundance, opportunities, ambition and confident action.

Protection

Black Obsidian is worn as a symbolic shield against negativity, nazar and unwanted external influences.

Grounding

Lava Stone and Black Obsidian are traditionally connected with stability, emotional strength and remaining calm under pressure.

Confidence

The overall combination represents pursuing success with self-belief while maintaining focus and balance.

Crystal benefits are based on traditional beliefs and are not medical, professional or financial guarantees.

Innovation
Three complete crystal bracelets in one coordinated set
Combination of polished, metallic and naturally textured beads
Prosperity, protection and grounding-inspired crystal selection
Hamsa charm incorporated into one bracelet
Different designs connected through one colour story
Flexible styling for solo, paired or stacked wear
Suitable for both meaningful crystal use and fashion styling
